PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INCORPORATED'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights and Restraining Order And Turnover Order IS GRANTED, No opposition was filed. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported.
